query:
SELECT tipo, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_costo,
  MAX(costo_por_unidad) as max_costo
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES'
GROUP BY tipo;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT tipo, COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN costo_por_unidad > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_costo,
  MAX(costo_por_unidad) as max_costo
FROM anuncios 
WHERE cliente = 'OPIOIDES'
GROUP BY tipo;
